name: Leaderboard tab loads rankings and accepts a nickname
description: RANKS tab fetches the leaderboard and lets the player set a nickname.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game with the URL path /?fresh=1 (this starts a brand-new save) and wait for the game HUD showing GOLD to load
Verify the leaderboard area renders either a list of entries or an explicit empty state, not an error
Enter a nickname of 2-16 letters into the nickname input and submit it
Verify the UI confirms the nickname was saved or the leaderboard shows the submitted nickname
